report.summary: Cycle-close: Production frozen at e3f63fc (5 days). 125 uncommitted files (20 modified, 105 untracked). 1,251 page.tsx files, 696 published slugs, 111 phantom slugs. All 6 API routes structurally healthy. Deploy debt remains the sole critical blocker.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,251 total page.tsx files verified present in src/app — unchanged from earlier cycle
696 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 678 in prior cycle — 18 new entries added in uncommitted changes)
111 phantom slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES without corresponding page.tsx — mostly learn guides, blog posts, and courses using dynamic routes or not yet scaffolded
20 modified files in working tree: 6 learn guide pages, 5 tool pages, 4 OG images, published-pages.ts, StablecoinYieldTracker component, package-lock.json, notifications feed
No 'use client' + metadata export conflicts detected on any recently modified pages — build fix 3b2dd28 pattern holding
4 tool pages built but NOT in PUBLISHED_PAGES: token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap — need promotion
Live site verification blocked by network egress proxy — unable to confirm HTTP 200 status on production pages

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API route files present and verified:
/api/prices — 60s cache, CoinGecko /coins/markets, ISR revalidate=60, s-maxage=60 swr=120
/api/trending — 300s cache, CoinGecko /search/trending, s-maxage=300 swr=600
/api/fear-greed — 600s cache, Alternative.me FNG endpoint, s-maxage=600 swr=1200
/api/market-metrics — 60s cache, multi-source (FNG + CoinGecko global), Promise.allSettled
/api/market-dominance — 300s cache, ISR revalidate=300, FALLBACK_DATA present with 8 top coins
/api/defi-yields — DeFiLlama pools, delegates caching to lib/defillama. WARNING: no hardcoded fallback data in route, no route-level rate limiting — most fragile route
Cache TTL alignment verified: all routes use consistent in-memory + CDN stale-while-revalidate pattern
External API live health unverifiable from sandbox (egress blocked)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest committed deploy: e3f63fc — 'feat: 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker, published pages update' (5 days ago)
Production FROZEN since commit on Apr 2 — all subsequent work trapped in 125 uncommitted files
125 uncommitted files breakdown: 20 modified tracked files + 105 new untracked files (OG SVGs, reports, social drafts, design artifacts)
Build config stable: output=standalone, trailingSlash=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true, workerThreads=false
Middleware verified intact: Edge-compatible, inline PILLAR_PAGES, security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
CRITICAL: Deploy needed to push 18+ newly published page entries and uncommitted tool/learn updates to production

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE (code-level, not deployed): 18 new published page entries, 6 learn guide updates, 5 tool page updates, 5 new OG images, StablecoinYieldTracker component refactor
BLOCKED: All content is registry-only — nothing reaches production without commit + deploy
CARRY-OVER P0: Commit 125 files + Vercel deploy — production frozen 5 days
CARRY-OVER P1: Add FALLBACK_DATA to /api/defi-yields route + add rate limiting
CARRY-OVER P1: Promote 4 built tool pages to PUBLISHED_PAGES (token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap)
CARRY-OVER P2: Scaffold page.tsx for 2 queue items (monad-guide, zora-attention-markets)
CARRY-OVER P2: Clean up 111 phantom slugs (published without page.tsx)
BLOCKERS NEEDING JEFE: Deploy authorization is the sole blocker. All other work is automatable.
